pi_items.source: seed_products.php: Bose QuietComfort Ultra Earbuds is 4th product in array, variation_id auto-increments from 1

task.json description states 'Bose QuietComfort Ultra Earbuds currently shows $299.00 but correct retail price should be $279.00'. Seed data confirms initial price is 299.00. Expected value is the target price for the correction.
seed_products.php: WD Black SN850X 2TB NVMe SSD is 9th product in array, variation_id auto-increments from 1

task.json description states 'WD Black SN850X 2TB NVMe SSD is currently priced at $149.99 but needs to be updated to $129.99'. Seed data confirms initial price is 149.99. Expected value is the target price for the correction.
seed_products.php: Corsair Vengeance DDR5 32GB RAM Kit is 12th product in array, variation_id auto-increments from 1

task.json description states 'Corsair Vengeance DDR5 32GB RAM Kit has incorrect SKU. Its current SKU CORSAIR-DDR5-32G should be changed to CORSAIR-DDR5-32GB'. Seed data (line 56) confirms initial SKU is 'CORSAIR-DDR5-32G'. Expected value is the corrected SKU.
seed_products.php: Sony WH-1000XM5 Wireless Headphones is 1st product in array, variation_id auto-increments from 1

task.json description states 'Sony WH-1000XM5 needs list price set to $399.99 to show it is on sale from the original retail price'. Seed data does not set list_price field (defaults to NULL). Expected value is the target list price.
task.json description states 'selling price ($348.00) should remain unchanged'. Seed data (line 45) confirms Sony price is '348.00'. Expected value is the unchanged selling price.
seed_products.php: Anker PowerCore 26800mAh Portable Charger is 7th product in array, product_id auto-increments from 1

task.json description states 'Unpublish the Anker PowerCore 26800mAh Portable Charger' with product_id=7. In Drupal, unpublish means set status=0 (currently 1). Expected value represents unpublished state.

privileged_info_summary: All 11 metadata claims are verified against the Drupal Commerce seed data. The task operates on a synthetic dataset with 12 products created by seed_products.php. Key verified facts: (1) Bose product (variation_id=4) initial price is $299.00, target is $279.00. (2) WD product (variation_id=9) initial price is $149.99, target is $129.99. (3) Corsair product (variation_id=12) initial SKU is 'CORSAIR-DDR5-32G', target is 'CORSAIR-DDR5-32GB'. (4) Sony product (variation_id=1) initial price is $348.00 (unchanged), list_price must be set to $399.99. (5) Anker product (product_id=7) initial status is 1 (published), target is 0 (unpublished).
